items.raw_desc: Kanál Made in Japan kanál Matt 15 cm:        Made In Japan is an Australian brand that imports Japanese ceramics from the Mino area, where the soil is rich in many of the ingredients needed for production. Ceramics is therefore aptly called Minoyaki. This Made in Japan Matt spoon in black also comes from this workshop. Minoyaki is appreciated for being handmade and hiding centuries-old traditions that inspire local artists. Each piece of dishes is original and its colours are permanent and do not peel off. The design of the spoon is simple, which highlights the material and its quality. It does not contain any metals or other harmful substances. The advantage is the use of a Made in Japan spoon in the dishwasher and in the microwave. Magnesium is a part of many important processes in the body and is therefore the basis of daily supplementation in sports and everyday life. Its effects affect the nervous system, and many of these effects are also seen during physical exercise. The package contains 90 capsules.                     An energizing form of magnesium with high availabilityTogether with bisglycinate, malate is one of the most highly absorbable forms of magnesium due to the unique binding of magnesium to a single malate molecule, which allows for faster absorption while protecting the element from antinutrients that can negatively affect magnesium absorption*. It can be based on the same efficient form as bisglycinate, with the difference that malate is part of the energy metabolism - specifically the Krebs cycle**. In addition to the usual benefits, revitalizing effects and higher energy levels can also be expected.

A készítmény ultravékony, láthatatlan, víztaszító réteget képez, amely véd a későbbi szennyeződésektől, rovarok megtapadásától, ujjlenyomatoktól, lerakódásoktól és oxidációtól.
